column1: Enhancing Skills of Sri Lankan Tour Guides
It is concerning that not many hoteliers and MSMEs consider TGs as important stakeholders of
their business and hence investigated the reasons causing this situation. Many of the MSMEs are
concerned about  the lack of fair-trade consciousness  when dealing with them as  well as their
clients  (foreigners),  as  seen  in  the  verbatims  of  MSMEs  interviewed  in  this  study  presented
